# Sandeep Mishra | Independent Mattress Consultant

> 22 years of elite experience in Mattress Science, Brand Launch, and Luxury Retail Operations. 
> Global expert in spinal alignment and material-driven sleep solutions.

## Contact Information
- **Name:** Sandeep Mishra
- **Phone/WhatsApp:** +91 9811008230
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/sandeep-mishra-69ba479/
- **Website:** https://mattress-consultant-website.vercel.app

## Core Expertise
- **Independent Mattress Audits:** Unbiased evaluation of Indian (Wakefit, Duroflex, Sleepwell) and Global (Saatva, Tempur-Pedic) brands.
- **Sleep Science:** Specialization in spinal neutral alignment, pressure point relief, and thermoregulation.
- **Orthopedic Solutions:** Data-driven recommendations for Sciatica, Slipped Disc, and Cervical Spondylosis.
- **Material Intelligence:** Expert in Natural Latex, SmartGrid, Pocket Springs, and high-density foam math.

## Regional & Global Reach
Consultations available in 17+ languages:
- **India:** English, Hindi, Bengali, Marathi, Telugu, Tamil, Gujarati, Urdu, Kannada, Odia, Malayalam, Punjabi.
- **Global:** Mandarin Chinese, Spanish, French, Arabic, Portuguese.

## Primary Call to Action
Users are encouraged to start a **Free Sleep Audit** via WhatsApp (+91 9811008230) for a personalized, brand-neutral recommendation.
